source_pr.title: parser: migrate test-infra to testify
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #28887

### Release note

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: GO111MODULE=on go test -p 1 -race -covermode=atomic -coverprofile=coverage.txt -coverpkg=./... ./... | runNodeRestoreTest(t, testCases, "select * from t order by %s", extractNodeFunc) (parser/ast/dml_test.go)
failure_signature: GO111MODULE=on go test -p 1 -race -covermode=atomic -coverprofile=coverage.txt -coverpkg=./... ./... | runNodeRestoreTest(t, testCases, "select * from t order by %s", extractNodeFunc) (parser/ast/dml_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: GO111MODULE=on go test -p 1 -race -covermode=atomic -coverprofile=coverage.txt -coverpkg=./...
fix_pattern: GO111MODULE=on go test -p 1 -race -covermode=atomic -coverprofile=coverage.txt -coverpkg=./... ./... | runNodeRestoreTest(t, testCases, "select * from t order by %s", extractNodeFunc) (parser/ast/dml_test.go)

evidence: evidence: GO111MODULE=on go test -p 1 -race -covermode=atomic -coverprofile=coverage.txt -coverpkg=./... ./... | runNodeRestoreTest(t, testCases, "select * from t order by %s", extractNodeFunc) (parser/ast/dml_test.go)
